name: Microsoft Learn MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Microsoft Learn MCP server providing AI agents with access to the full Microsoft documentation corpus — Azure, .NET, Microsoft 365, Visual Studio, and thousands of Microsoft technical docs.
use_cases: Looking up Microsoft Azure documentation from agent workflows
Finding .NET API documentation for agent-driven code generation
Querying Microsoft 365 API docs for integration guidance
Getting Azure service configuration examples from official docs
Answering technical questions about Microsoft products from current docs
not_for: Real-time product feature inquiries (docs may lag releases)
best_when: An agent needs accurate, current documentation from Microsoft's technical library — Azure services, .NET, M365, or any Microsoft developer product.
avoid_when: You need documentation for non-Microsoft technologies — use broader web search or product-specific docs instead.

auth.notes: Public documentation — no authentication required. Completely open access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — Microsoft Learn docs are publicly accessible
pricing.notes: Free public access to all Microsoft Learn documentation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits not prominently documented; standard API limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation content may lag product releases by days to weeks
Search quality varies by query specificity — use exact product/service names
Rate limits not documented — add backoff for high-frequency doc lookups in agent loops
Multilingual results may appear — filter by language if needed
Some docs are region-specific (Azure sovereign clouds) — check for geo-specific variants
agent_readiness.security_notes: No credentials required — completely public. HTTPS enforced. Official Microsoft infrastructure with enterprise-grade reliability.

security_score_components.security_notes: No credentials needed — zero security setup required. Official Microsoft infrastructure. HTTPS enforced.
